_instructions: Edit this file to update your CV. Use [em]text[/em] for gold italic emphasis in long-text fields (summary, bullets). Use plain text everywhere else. Ampersands and dashes can be written as-is.

hero.label: Structural Integrity · Oil & Gas · Offshore · Energy Transition
hero.title: Principal Structural Integrity Engineer & ECA Lead · Saipem

summary: Eight years shaping the structural integrity of the world's most critical energy infrastructure — from deepwater pipelines off the coast of Angola to pre-salt FPSO systems in Brazil. A technical leader who [em]bridges rigorous engineering with strategic business impact[/em], driving cost reduction, operational reliability, and long-term client partnerships across four continents.

cards.role: Principal Structural Integrity Engineer · ECA Lead
cards.summary: Leading high-stakes Engineering Critical Assessments across deepwater infrastructure for Shell, ENI, Petrobras, ExxonMobil and TotalEnergies — across four continents.
bullets: Lead and manage ECA project teams and resources, ensuring technical excellence and deadline compliance across concurrent projects.
Develop innovative calculation methodologies grounded in industry standards (BS7910, DNV) and state-of-the-art fracture mechanics research.
Define optimal weld acceptance criteria by balancing installation constraints with structural reliability — directly reducing repair rates offshore.
Collaborate with senior executives and client representatives to align engineering solutions with strategic project objectives.
Drive significant financial savings by minimising mechanical testing requirements through intelligent, evidence-based acceptance criteria design.
Enhance team productivity through process automation (Python), workflow optimisation and custom internal tooling.

impacts.label: Operational Impact
impacts.value: Reduced offshore repair rates & enhanced structural reliability

impacts.label: Cost Reduction
impacts.value: Minimised testing & repair costs through smart acceptance criteria

impacts.label: Client Partnerships
impacts.value: Long-term relationships with Petrobras, ENI, Shell, ExxonMobil

cards.summary: Deployed offshore on one of the world's largest pipelaying vessels during the Buzios 5 campaign — bridging engineering theory with live installation operations at sea.
bullets: Oversaw the implementation of methods for pipelaying, subsea structures, and equipment installation during active offshore operations.
Worked alongside vessel engineers, technicians, and Petrobras representatives to ensure procedural alignment.
Provided safe, efficient, and cost-effective engineering solutions in response to unexpected operational events.
Delivered real-time technical troubleshooting and site query support.

cards.summary: Master's thesis project: pioneering a constitutive model identification methodology for FE-based fracture mechanics assessments of carbon steel pipelines.
bullets: Identified material constitutive models for FE-based fracture mechanics assessments of API X65 carbon steel.
Comparative analysis of numerical optimisation methods and material models.
Developed Abaqus models using Python scripting for automated tensile test simulation.
Applied the model to SEN(T) specimens — directly feeding into production ECA workflows used today.

cards.summary: Leading structural integrity scope for Shell's Bonga North deepwater development — one of the most technically complex FPSO tiebacks in West Africa, in water depths exceeding 1,000m.

cards.org: Agogo Full Field Development · ENI · Angola
cards.summary: Full-field development scope for ENI Angola — defining structural integrity strategy across all pipeline and riser systems for one of Angola's major deepwater developments.
French energy transition project under ADEME — applying offshore structural integrity expertise to new energy infrastructure, directly supporting France's renewable energy strategy.
Structural integrity leadership for Petrobras' Buzios 7 FPSO — continuing a multi-year partnership in the world's largest deepwater pre-salt field, operating at depths beyond 2,000m.
Three-year structural integrity leadership on the Buzios 5 FPSO project — from initial engineering through to offshore installation, culminating in the 2023 vessel deployment on the FDS.

Structural integrity contributions to Noble Energy's ALEN project off Equatorial Guinea, alongside a parallel technical investigation into subsea pipeline integrity for TotalEnergies' Kaombo development in Angola.
Structural integrity engineering for ExxonMobil's landmark Liza Phase 1 — the first major deepwater oil development in Guyana, opening a new deepwater province for a country.
Contributed to multiple Front-End Engineering Design studies and bid proposals for major operators, developing structural integrity strategies at the earliest project phases.

cards.role: Master of Research — Mechanics, Materials, Structures & Processes
cards.org: Arts et Métiers Institute of Technology
cards.summary: Research master's degree at one of France's most prestigious engineering institutions, with a thesis directly applied to industrial pipeline integrity.
bullets: Thesis: Identification of carbon steel constitutive behavior for applications in fracture mechanics.
Coursework: Fracture, Fatigue, Non-linear mechanics, Finite Elements, Composites, Thermomechanics, Multiscale mechanics, Continuum damage mechanics.

cards.org: École Nationale Supérieure d'Arts et Métiers
cards.summary: French grande école engineering degree in mechanical engineering — the dual French-Moroccan ENSAM system, equivalent to a top-tier European engineering MSc.
bullets: Coursework: Machine elements design, CAD (CATIA, AutoCAD), Fabrication processes, Finite Elements, Mechanical design, Maintenance engineering.

cards.summary: Currently enrolled in the CFA Level 1 programme — one of the most rigorous credentials in global finance, reinforcing the analytical and financial acumen required for executive leadership at the intersection of engineering and business.
bullets: Enrolled and actively preparing for the CFA Level 1 examination (February / May 2027 sitting).

Curriculum: Ethical & Professional Standards, Quantitative Methods, Economics, Financial Reporting & Analysis, Corporate Finance, Equity Investments, Fixed Income, Derivatives, Alternative Investments, Portfolio Management & Wealth Planning.

cards.summary: A structured, intentional programme bridging deep engineering expertise with executive-level business acumen — laying the foundation for an MBA and a broader leadership role.
bullets: Oil & Gas Industry Operations and Markets
Modelling and Measuring the Energy Transition
Business Foundations Specialisation
Strategic Management
Financial Management Specialisation
Mergers and Acquisitions
Climate Change: Carbon Capture and Storage

cards.role: BOSIET — Basic Offshore Safety Induction & Emergency Training
cards.summary: Industry-standard offshore safety certification — prerequisite for working on offshore installations and vessels worldwide.
bullets: Sea survival & raft deployment
Helicopter underwater escape (HUET)
First aid & emergency response
Firefighting & smoke environments
Compressed Air Emergency Breathing Systems (CA-EBS)

cards.summary: Specialist training in Noesis Optimus — a professional optimisation software used for numerical design-of-experiment and process integration in engineering simulations.
